mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( meetup_id, member_id, content, is_public ) VALUES ( #{meetupId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, IF(#{isPublic} = 1, 'Y', 'N') )
mapper.select: SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews WHERE meetup_id = #{meetupId} AND is_public = 'Y' AND delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS id, r.meetup_id AS meetupId, r.member_id AS memberId, r.content, IF(r.is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(r.delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT meetup_id, COUNT(meetup_id) AS like_count FROM meetup_likes WHERE delete_yn = 'N' GROUP BY meetup_id ) like_info ON r.meetup_id = like_info.meetup_id WHERE r.is_public = 'Y' AND r.delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY like_info.like_count DESC

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews WHERE delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
